description_long: This object is a dark, stylized pumpkin with a glossy black surface and a pronounced, pointed stem at the top. The front features a menacing carved face with glowing purple eyes and a jagged, sinister smile outlined in orange, giving it a Halloween-themed appearance. The pumpkin's body is round and segmented, with subtle ridges running vertically from the stem to the base. The facial features are sharply defined, with the eyes and mouth deeply cut into the surface, suggesting an internal hollow space. The back and sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the contrast with the expressive front. The overall look is both eerie and decorative, suitable for urban Halloween displays or themed events.
description: A glossy black pumpkin with a pointed stem, featuring a carved, glowing purple-eyed face and a jagged orange-outlined mouth. The back is smooth and uncarved, highlighting the dramatic front.
description_view_0: The pumpkin is seen from the back, showing a smooth, glossy black surface with no carvings or facial features visible.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the carved face with glowing purple eyes and a jagged, orange-outlined mouth, as well as the pointed stem at the top.
description_view_2: This side view shows part of the carved face, with one glowing eye and a portion of the mouth visible, while the rest of the pumpkin remains smooth.
description_view_3: The top and back of the pumpkin are visible, displaying the pointed stem and the uncarved, glossy black surface.
attribute_carving_pattern: The pumpkin features a traditional Halloween-style carving with sharply defined, menacing eyes and a wide, jagged mouth. The eyes are almond-shaped and glow purple, while the mouth is outlined in orange and has a sinister, toothy grin. The style is expressive and dramatic, with no additional motifs or etchings beyond the facial features.
